prestazioni: Engine: 2.5L 2GR-FKS V6 (301 hp stock) - Full forged internals upgrade with JE Pistons 9.0:1 compression forged pistons, Manley H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 8,000 RPM reliability. Pair with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate for 550whp on E85 with a custom Haltech Elite 2500 ECU tune.

Drivetrain: Strengthened 8-speed automatic transmission (UA80E) with a PTT Performance Level 3 valve body kit, Sonnax oversized servo, and a Precision Industries 300M billet torque converter (2,800 RPM stall). Upgrade to a Cusco 2-way LSD with 40% lockup for the AWD system (TNGA-K platform).

Suspension: Full Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (part #DFV-01-02-01) with custom valving for the Crown Signia’s 1,650kg weight, paired with SuperPro poly bushings (part #SPF1002K) and Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear). Add a Cusco front strut tower bar (part #631 540 A) and a custom rear subframe brace from Buddy Club.
estetica: Body: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody kit (modified for Crown Signia’s TNGA-K chassis) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (part #TO-1850CF) and a custom 3D-printed rear diffuser from Rocket Bunny (Pandem Crown Signia-specific).

Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +25 front and 19x11.5 +35 rear (5x114.3 PCD) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear). Add custom titanium wheel spacers from 5Zigen (15mm front, 20mm rear).

Interior: Full Bride Zeta III reclinable bucket seats (part #BR-802) with custom Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses, paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub and a custom carbon fiber dash overlay from AutoTecknic. Add a Defi BF Advance digital gauge cluster (oil pressure, boost, and wideband AFR) mounted in a custom A-pillar pod.
